category.scope_note: Hand-held and transportable electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Colombia, covering electrical safety, EMC/radio, market access, noise, and substance/battery considerations.

title.en: China-to-Colombia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Colombian market access, including NTC/IEC 62841 safety, RETIE technical regulation, EMC and CRC/ANE radio rules, noise handling, and substance/battery considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与哥伦比亚市场准入要求对照，涵盖 NTC/IEC 62841 安全、RETIE 技术规章、电磁兼容及 CRC/ANE 无线电规则、噪声处理及物质/电池考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與哥倫比亞市場准入要求對照，涵蓋 NTC/IEC 62841 安全、RETIE 技術規章、電磁相容及 CRC/ANE 無線電規則、噪聲處理及物質/電池考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited certification-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Colombian technical regulations (RETIE, RETILAP, RETIQ), adopted NTC/IEC standards, ONAC accreditation, SIC enforcement practice, and CRC/ANE radio rules with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可认证机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行哥伦比亚技术规章（RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ）、采用的 NTC/IEC 标准、ONAC 认可、SIC 执法实践及 CRC/ANE 无线电规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可認證機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥倫比亞技術規章（RETIE、RETILAP、RETIQ）、採用的 NTC/IEC 標準、ONAC 認可、SIC 執法實務及 CRC/ANE 無線電規則。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Colombia, market access centers on product safety to NTC/IEC 62841 (NTC adopting IEC), conformity assessment through ONAC-accredited certification bodies with a Certificate of Conformity, RETIE technical-regulation compliance where the tool is wired into electrical installations, and CRC/ANE radio authorization for cordless or wireless functions. Colombia operates at 110/220 V 60 Hz, differing from China's 220/380 V 50 Hz, and does not have an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise marking regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入哥伦比亚，市场准入核心是按 NTC/IEC 62841（NTC 采用 IEC）满足产品安全、通过 ONAC 认可的认证机构进行符合性评定并取得符合性证书、在工具接入电气装置时满足 RETIE 技术规章，以及对无绳或无线功能取得 CRC/ANE 无线电许可。哥伦比亚电网为 110/220 V 60 Hz，与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 不同，且没有欧盟式横向 RoHS、电池或户外噪声标识制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入哥倫比亞，市場准入核心是按 NTC/IEC 62841（NTC 採用 IEC）滿足產品安全、通過 ONAC 認可的認證機構進行符合性評定並取得符合性證書、在工具接入電氣裝置時滿足 RETIE 技術規章，以及對無繩或無線功能取得 CRC/ANE 無線電許可。哥倫比亞電網為 110/220 V 60 Hz，與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 不同，且沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲標識制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, accredited certification body, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
